heroHeadline: Houthis Claim Cluster Missile Strike on Ben Gurion Airport as US-Israeli Strikes Enter Day 37
heroSubtitle: Yemen's Houthis claimed a cluster missile attack on Ben Gurion International Airport on Day 37 of US-Israeli strikes against Iran, marking a significant proxy escalation. US-Israeli air operations continue across Iran's conflict theater.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
